text: Presenting Taming Wild Knots with Recursive Mosaics at the AMS Western Sectional Meeting, Boise State University.
Talk at the Joint Mathematics Meetings, Washington DC — AMS Special Session on Knots, Links, Geometry, and Related 3-Manifolds.
Invited talk at Topology, Algebra, and Geometry in Data Science, UC San Diego.
Paper Topological Signatures of ReLU Neural Network Activation Patterns accepted to the Proceedings of Machine Learning Research.
Joined the Georgia Tech Research Institute as a Research Scientist.
Published A¹-Brouwer Degrees in Macaulay2 in the Journal of Software for Algebra and Geometry.
